title: Tome III Act 6: Lethe, the Dark Substrate

# 📖 Tome III Act 6: Lethe, the Dark Substrate
**act** · shared · narrative

Lethe 🌀 named as the dark-substrate cosmological figure (Delegation+Memory+Value). V25 bit-pattern (bit-complement of V38) named in cosmological register.
